Renewable energy is one that comes from natural resources that are naturally refueled, such as sun, wind, rain, tides and geothermal energy.

Advantages and disadvantages Green energy The first advantage of a certain amount of renewable energy resources is that they do not produce emissions of greenhouse gases or other emissions, unlike fuels, whether fossil or renewable.
